mapper.select: SELECT id, name, author, isbn, stock, type, status, cover, description, create_time as createTime FROM book WHERE id=#{id}
SELECT id, name, author, isbn, stock, type, status, cover, description, create_time as createTime FROM book WHERE isbn=#{isbn}
SELECT id, name, author, isbn, stock, type, status, cover, description, create_time as createTime FROM book ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}

SELECT id, name, author, isbn, stock, type, status, cover, description, create_time as createTime FROM book WHERE status = 1 AND (name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR author LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR isbn LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM book WHERE status = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM book WHERE status = 1 AND (name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR author LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR isbn LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
SELECT type, COUNT(*) as count FROM book GROUP BY type

SELECT b.id, b.name, b.author, b.isbn, b.stock, b.type, b.status, b.cover, b.description, b.create_time as createTime, COUNT(br.id) as borrowCount FROM book b LEFT JOIN borrow br ON b.id = br.book_id WHERE b.status = 1 GROUP BY b.id ORDER BY borrowCount DESC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO book (name, author, isbn, stock, type, status, cover, description, create_time) VALUES (#{name}, #{author}, #{isbn}, #{stock}, #{type}, #{status}, #{cover}, #{description}, #{createTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE book SET cover = #{cover} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE book SET stock = stock + #{num} WHERE id = #{id} AND stock + #{num} >= 0
